name: Ravichandrika

sources.label: Suja Music — Ravichandrika scale and kritis

notes: Janya of Harikambhoji (28th melakarta); vakra raga — ārohana S R2 G3 M1 D2 N2 D2 S', avarohana S' N2 D2 M1 G3 R2 S; rare raga, sung mostly in early concert segments; best known for two Tyagaraja kritis: Makelara and Nirvadhi Sukhada
